mapper.insert: insert into student(name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, degree, graduation_date, clazz_id, violation_count, violation_score, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{degree}, #{graduationDate}, #{clazzId}, #{violationCount}, #{violationScore}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update student
name = #{name},
no = #{no},
gender = #{gender},
phone = #{phone},
id_card = #{idCard},
is_college = #{isCollege},
address = #{address},
degree = #{degree},
graduation_date = #{graduationDate},
clazz_id = #{clazzId},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select (case when clazz_id=1 then 'JavaEE就业163期' when clazz_id=2 then '前端就业90期' when clazz_id=3 then 'JavaEE就业165期' when clazz_id=4 then 'JavaEE就业166期' when clazz_id=5 then '大数据就业58期' when clazz_id=6 then 'JavaEE就业167期' else '其它' end) clazz, count(*) num from student group by clazz_id order by clazz_id
select (case when degree='2' then '本科' when degree='1' then '大专' when degree='3' then '硕士' when degree='4' then '博士' else '其它' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree
